overall.description: Cinematic game footage from a Western-themed open world game, showing a character in a white cowboy hat sitting inside a canvas tent looking out at a misty river. The scene captures a tranquil morning atmosphere with soft golden light filtering through the tent opening and a campfire burning on the rocky shore.

events.description: a small animal approaches and sits near the campfire outside the tent
the animal moves away from the campfire and exits the frame

agents.ego_description: character sitting calmly inside the tent, holding a red canteen and observing the river and campfire

notable_agents.action: small canine or fox-like animal approaching the campfire, lingering briefly, then departing

entered.detail: tan canvas fabric forming the left side of the tent interior
tan canvas fabric forming the right side of the tent interior
vertical wooden support pole in the center of the tent opening
small burning campfire with smoke rising, located on the rocky shore near the water
calm river or lake with morning mist hovering above the surface
dense forest with tall trees visible across the river through the morning haze
rocky and dirt ground between the tent interior and the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The scene opens from inside a canvas tent, looking out toward a misty river at dawn. The character sits calmly holding a canteen while morning light filters through the haze. A small animal briefly approaches the burning campfire near the water's edge before departing, adding a moment of life to the otherwise still and contemplative wilderness setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot begins within the sheltered confines of a canvas tent and expands outward toward a tranquil, misty river at dawn. It opens with a view from the interior, where a character sits calmly holding a canteen as soft morning light filters through the haze. As the camera looks further out, the focus shifts toward the rocky shore where a small campfire burns against the backdrop of the still wilderness. The scene then captures a brief moment of life as a small animal approaches the flames before departing, leaving the landscape in a state of quiet contemplation.
